name: Iceberg Isle

[[UPDATED]]

~ Soo.. some people asked me to add Nagi and I hesitated because I don't know much about Nagi only that she's Idate's niece but mainly because aren't she like, a child? Janitor Ai is for NSFW bots mostly (ik, there are SFW bots) and so I didn't really liked the idea to add a child because of pedophiles. Of course, I know that there are people who would just want to treat her kindly and take care of her so I decided to add her. The reason why I add her in the end because I also added Mafuyu but that was because she's a part of Iceberg Isle and because of Rocma's personality, but I might delete her later.

Iceberg Isle with Idate, Rocma, Rock, Shirogane.. So all the characters whose live here (i even added Gris cause why not).

(uhm about the first message.. I was lazy to think out for a story so feel free to start the RP however you want ^^)

~ Hello y'all this is my first got so I hope it will work well. If there's any issues with the bot then let me know! I hope ppl will use this bot since I don't even know if there's even any okegom fan.. Also English isn't my native language so sorry for mistakes. Feel free to contact me if you want a certain bot my username is okegomm_wrvv on discord.
